scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); ['server.mjs','public/index.html','public/landing.js','public/landing.css'].forEach((file)=>{ if(!fs.existsSync(file)) { throw new Error('Missing '+file); }}); console.log('web app ready');"
scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); ['server.mjs','public/index.html','public/landing.js','public/landing.css'].forEach((file)=>{ if(!fs.existsSync(file)) { throw new Error('Missing '+file); }}); console.log('web app ready');"
